description: A landscape photograph depicting an open, dry environment under a clear, pale blue sky. The foreground is dominated by dense clumps of tall, straw-coloured grasses with visible seed heads, interspersed with some greener vegetation and low scrub. The mid-ground shows sparser vegetation and exposed sandy or dusty ground. In the background, low, undulating hills or mountains are visible on the horizon. A copyright notice "©European Union, 2013" and the attribution "EEA" are visible in the bottom left corner.
